action.title: Action
action.description: Action to perform: 'search' for web search, 'scrape' for single page extraction

limit.title: Result Limit
limit.description: Number of search results to return (1-50). Each result's full content will be fetched automatically.

withContent.title: Fetch Full Content
withContent.description: When enabled, automatically fetches full page content (markdown + summary) for each search result. When disabled, returns only title/url/snippet.

formats.title: Output Formats
formats.description: Output formats for page scraping. 'markdown' gives full text, 'summary' gives AI-generated summary.
